response.step_by_step_log: 1. Scanned the video from 00:00 to 05:00. 2. Performer (Ninomae Ina'nis) is continuously playing Minecraft and speaking. 3. Monitored all audio tracks for vocal music. 4. Confirmed that only game sound effects and speaking audio are present. No vocal music was detected.
response.global_summary: A Minecraft gameplay session with commentary by Ninomae Ina'nis. No vocal music is present throughout the video.

scenes.description: Continuous Minecraft gameplay with commentary from the streamer. Sound is comprised of in-game effects and speech.
